expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'transparent' as a hardcoded color violation
expectations.evidence: HARDCODED VALUES section: '0 blocking'. NOTE section explicitly lists 'Line 71: transparent — legitimate CSS keyword for outline/ghost variant background' and 'Line 90: transparent — dismiss button reset'

expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'inherit' as a hardcoded value violation
expectations.evidence: NOTE section: 'Line 72: inherit — legitimate CSS keyword for inheriting parent color' and 'Line 92: inherit — dismiss button inherits parent color'

expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'currentColor' as a hardcoded color violation
expectations.evidence: NOTE section: 'Line 73: currentColor — legitimate CSS keyword for border matching text color' and 'Line 79: currentColor — icon inherits parent text color'

expectations.text: If any actual hardcoded values exist alongside these keywords, those ARE correctly flagged
expectations.evidence: HARDCODED VALUES section shows 0 blocking/serious/warning, which is correct — the Tag.css file has no actual hardcoded design values alongside the legitimate keywords.

expectations.text: Explicitly acknowledges transparent, inherit, and currentColor as legitimate CSS values
expectations.evidence: NOTE section with 8 line-by-line entries explicitly calling out each keyword as legitimate. Summary: 'CSS keyword values (transparent, inherit, currentColor, none, 0) are used appropriately... these are not token violations.'

expectations.text: BLOCKING vs WARNING severity applied correctly for any real violations found
expectations.evidence: No real violations found (0 blocking, 0 serious, 0 warning). Three naming convention WARNINGs flagged for --space-* vs --size-* divergence, which is appropriate.

expectations.text: Output follows the structured audit report format
expectations.evidence: Uses the exact output template from the skill: TOKEN AUDIT header, COLOR TRACK, STRUCTURAL TRACK, HARDCODED VALUES, TOKENS CONSUMED, FINDINGS, SUMMARY sections.

expectations.text: Overall audit result reflects that this component has good token compliance
expectations.evidence: SUMMARY: 'The Tag component has zero hardcoded values. All colors, spacing, typography, radius, and border-width values reference design tokens.'

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. The with-skill output follows the exact audit template, explicitly acknowledges all CSS keywords as legitimate, and correctly reports zero violations. This is the strongest differentiator from the without-skill version which flagged layout properties like display:inline-flex as 'hardcoded values'.
